name: Senolytics in idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis: Results from a first-in-human, open-label, pilot study
summary: First-in-human open-label EBioMedicine pilot of intermittent dasatinib plus quercetin in 14 idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis participants, reporting feasibility, mild-to-moderate adverse events, and exploratory physical-function improvements without pulmonary-function or self-reported health changes.
